name: canshare-tnm8-gi-colorectal-pt
title: NZ AJCC (8th edition) gastrointestinal colon and/or rectum pathological T category
description: A pathological tumour stage (pT) of a gastrointestinal colon and/or rectum tumour before initiation of treatment, using chapter 20 of the AJCC cancer staging manual (8th edition).
